hiring_manager: Dan Huls, Director of Data and Analytics
core_pitch: I am a hands-on Lead Data Engineer with deep SQL, Python, ETL, database design, reporting automation, and production troubleshooting experience. My strongest background is enterprise SQL/Oracle/Redshift/AWS data platforms, and I can transfer that into Azure Data Factory and the Microsoft reporting stack quickly.
how_to_explain_azure_gap: My deepest production cloud data work has been AWS and Oracle/Redshift-style warehousing, but the engineering patterns transfer directly: source integration, pipeline orchestration, data flows, schema design, validation, monitoring, and reporting enablement. I have been actively preparing for Azure Data Factory / Fabric concepts and can ramp fast because the core work is ETL architecture and SQL-first data engineering.
interview_focus: SQL CTEs, joins, window functions, query tuning
How to design ADF-style pipelines, triggers, linked services, datasets, integration runtimes
Dimensional modeling for Power BI reporting
Data quality checks: reconciliation, row counts, duplicate checks, null checks, anomaly checks
Migration playbook from legacy/manual/SSRS-style reporting into Power BI-ready datasets
How to mentor a 5-person data team while staying hands-on
